articles.author: Lee Ying Shan
articles.title: South Korea stocks fall 5% as tech heavyweights follow plunge in Wall Street's AI-linked names - CNBC
articles.description: Asia-Pacific markets fell on Friday as investors assessed a rotation out of chip stocks on Wall Street that lifted the Dow Jones Industrial Average to a record close.
articles.content:
South Korea stocks plunged Friday, leading losses in the region, as the slump in Wall Street tech names overnight spread into Asia, dragging benchmark indexes lower.
The Kospi was last down 5.01%, w… [+1757 chars]
